spec_entities.name: SYSTEM CLOCK
spec_entities.description: "The system clock is the primary clock input for the SDC, and all synchronous logic operates on the rising edge of the system clock."

spec_entities.name: SYSTEM RESET
spec_entities.description: "The system reset is an asynchronous, active-low signal that clears all registers to default and deasserts the chip select when asserted low."

spec_entities.name: PERIPHERAL SELECT
spec_entities.description: "The peripheral select signal is driven high by the APB master to select the SDC."

spec_entities.name: TRANSFER ENABLE
spec_entities.description: "The transfer enable signal marks the second cycle of an APB transfer."

spec_entities.name: WRITE ENABLE
spec_entities.description: "The write enable signal is high for write and low for read operations."

spec_entities.name: REGISTER ADDRESS
spec_entities.description: "The register address signal is an 8-bit address bus that selects the target register."

spec_entities.name: WRITE DATA BUS
spec_entities.description: "The write data bus is a 32-bit data bus from the master to the SDC during writes."

spec_entities.name: READ DATA BUS
spec_entities.description: "The read data bus is a 32-bit data bus from the SDC to the master during reads."

spec_entities.name: TRANSFER ACKNOWLEDGE
spec_entities.description: "The transfer acknowledge signal is asserted high by the SDC to complete the APB transaction."

spec_entities.name: SERIAL CLOCK
spec_entities.description: "The serial clock signal is generated by the SDC and its frequency is set by the baud rate divisor."

spec_entities.name: MASTER DATA OUTPUT
spec_entities.description: "The master data output signal is the serial data output from the SDC to the external slave."

spec_entities.name: MASTER DATA INPUT
spec_entities.description: "The master data input signal is the serial data input from the external slave to the SDC."

spec_entities.name: CHIP SELECT
spec_entities.description: "The chip select signal is an active-low output that is driven low at the start of a frame to address the external slave."

spec_entities.name: INTERRUPT REQUEST
spec_entities.description: "The interrupt request signal is asserted when transmission is complete or a parity error is detected."

spec_entities.name: TRANSMISSION COMPLETE
spec_entities.description: "The transmission complete signal is pulsed for one clock cycle when the last bit of a frame has been shifted out."

spec_entities.name: TRANSMIT ACKNOWLEDGE
spec_entities.description: "The transmit acknowledge signal is set when the remote slave confirms receipt of the last transmitted byte."

spec_entities.name: FIFO EMPTY STATUS
spec_entities.description: "The FIFO empty status signal is asserted when the transmit buffer has no pending data and is ready for a new frame."

spec_entities.name: DATA VALID
spec_entities.description: "The data valid signal is asserted for one cycle when a new received byte is available in the receive buffer."

spec_entities.name: PARITY ERROR FLAG
spec_entities.description: "The parity error flag signal is set and held when a parity mismatch is detected on the received byte."

spec_entities.name: RECEIVE BUFFER FULL
spec_entities.description: "The receive buffer full signal is an active-low flag that is deasserted when the receive buffer cannot accept additional bytes."

spec_entities.name: FLOW CONTROL ENABLE
spec_entities.description: "The flow control enable signal is set in the control register to activate CTS/RTS-style handshaking."

spec_entities.name: CLOCK SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The clock signal is a signal that provides the timing for the SDC."

spec_entities.name: SYSTEM CLOCK SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The system clock signal is the primary clock input for the SDC."

spec_entities.name: SERIAL CLOCK SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The serial clock signal is generated by the SDC for the SPI interface."

spec_entities.name: CHIP SELECT SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The chip select signal is an active-low output that is driven low at the start of a frame to address the external slave."

spec_entities.name: MASTER DATA OUTPUT SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The master data output signal carries serial data from the SDC to the external slave."

spec_entities.name: MASTER DATA INPUT SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The master data input signal carries serial data from the external slave to the SDC."

spec_entities.name: TRANSFER ACKNOWLEDGE SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The transfer acknowledge signal is asserted high by the SDC to complete the APB transaction."

spec_entities.name: INTERRUPT REQUEST SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The interrupt request signal is asserted when transmission is complete or a parity error is detected."

spec_entities.name: TRANSMISSION COMPLETE SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The transmission complete signal is pulsed for one clock cycle when the last bit of a frame has been shifted out."

spec_entities.name: TRANSMIT ACKNOWLEDGE SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The transmit acknowledge signal is set when the remote slave confirms receipt of the last transmitted byte."

spec_entities.name: FIFO EMPTY STATUS SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The FIFO empty status signal is asserted when the transmit buffer has no pending data and is ready for a new frame."

spec_entities.name: DATA VALID SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The data valid signal is asserted for one cycle when a new received byte is available in the receive buffer."

spec_entities.name: PARITY ERROR FLAG SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The parity error flag signal is set and held when a parity mismatch is detected on the received byte."

spec_entities.name: RECEIVE BUFFER FULL SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The receive buffer full signal is an active-low flag that is deasserted when the receive buffer cannot accept additional bytes."

spec_entities.name: FLOW CONTROL ENABLE SIGNAL
spec_entities.description: "The flow control enable signal is set in the control register to activate CTS/RTS-style handshaking."

rtl_signals.raw_signal_name:
// Spec: "write data bus"
    output reg  [31:0] PRDATA

// Spec: "read data bus"
    output wire        PREADY

// Spec: "master data output"
    input  wire        MISO

// Spec: "master data input"
    output reg         SS_N

// Spec: "interrupt request"
    output wire        WE_N       // Spec: "write enable strobe" (active-low)
